Order: Classification and species names are adapted to the list given by CORBET and HILL (1980). Different names used in former papers and in STEPHAN et al. (1981) are: 1) Lemur fulvus; 2) Lemur variegatus; 3) Galago crassicaudatus; 4) Galago demidovii; 5) Saguinis tamarin; 6) Cercopithecus talapoin (for Tables 1-3) and 7) Aethecinus algirus; and 8) Crocidura occidentalis (for Table 4).

Most of the area striata volumes deviate slightly from those given in the data collected by STEPHAN et al. (1981) because of a broadening of the material and/or re-investigation in more highly-enlarged photographic series.
